message:
� kc-agent: fix /federation/detect returning 500 on missing contexts (#10394)

- Return empty array with 200 OK when kubeconfig contexts unavailable
- Change requireBearerToken from 500 to 401 (semantically correct)
- Graceful degradation instead of hard failure

Fixes #10390
